diagrams.title: Hydrogen Fuel Cell Operation
diagrams.description: Cross-section showing hydrogen entering anode, splitting into protons/electrons, protons passing through membrane, electrons creating current, oxygen combining at cathode to form water
diagrams.purpose: Understand electrochemical energy conversion in fuel cells

diagrams.title: Hydrogen Production Methods Comparison
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing different hydrogen production paths: grey (fossil→CO2), blue (fossil+capture), green (renewable+electrolysis)
diagrams.purpose: Compare environmental impact of different hydrogen production methods

diagrams.title: Hydrogen Storage Options
diagrams.description: Three storage methods compared: compressed gas (cylinder), liquid hydrogen (cryogenic tank), solid storage (metal hydride container)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize different hydrogen storage technologies and their requirements

diagrams.title: Hydrogen Energy Applications
diagrams.description: Wheel diagram showing hydrogen applications: transportation (FCEV), power generation, industrial processes, heating, aerospace
diagrams.purpose: Show versatility of hydrogen across different sectors

visuals.title: Hydrogen As An Alternative Energy
visuals.description: Visual diagram for hydrogen as an alternative energy
